summary: REQ-8 appears implemented by removing the physical address from the Contact and Footer UI. REQ-7 updates product image paths to the uploaded filenames (URL-encoded), but the diff provides no evidence that the actual image files were added under the frontend public assets directory.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the uploaded product images as static frontend assets under the frontend public directory so they are served directly by the frontend.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows Products.tsx now references /assets/100gm%20Front.jpg and /assets/200gm%20Front.jpg, but no files were added in the diff (Added: 0), so there is no evidence the images themselves were committed under frontend/public/assets.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a "Business Hours" card/section to the Contact page.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only asked to remove the physical address while keeping email/phone/WhatsApp; it did not request adding business hours content.
